creator: dburr@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Imported, with a few (very minor) stylistic changes: 
* It is customary to sign your name and e-mail address at the bottom of 
pkg/DESCR. 
* The spacing of the header in Makefile was wrong. 

Thanks for your submission!  Your name will be added to the "Additional 
FreeBSD Contributors" section of the Handbook.
